description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical outdoor stage structure with a panoramic printed image of an amphitheater and surrounding trees wrapping around its vertical surface. The cylinder is open at the top and appears to be constructed from a translucent or semi-glossy material, possibly acrylic or polycarbonate, with a high-resolution photographic print. The stage is set on a wide, flat rectangular platform that extends from one side, featuring several small, block-like structures that may represent stage equipment or seating. The printed image creates the illusion of a natural, open-air environment, blending the stage into a park or forested setting. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for public performances or gatherings in urban parks or plazas. The structure is robust and likely fixed in place, providing a durable and visually engaging focal point for events.
description: A large cylindrical stage with a panoramic amphitheater print, set on a wide platform with small block-like features. The structure is modern, open-topped, and visually blends into natural park settings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cylindrical stage with a clear image of amphitheater seating and trees, with the platform and block features partially visible behind.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the platform extending from the cylinder and reveals more of the small block-like structures adjacent to the stage.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the open, unadorned side of the cylinder and the full extent of the platform, with the block features more prominent.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the curvature of the cylinder and the panoramic print, with the platform and blocks visible to the left.
